docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPENTER, CHRISTINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PURI, PAUL $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,615.00, THE CORRECT NAME OF DEFENDANT IS PAUL PURI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
